id.description: The unique ID of the user.

first_name.description: The first name of the user.

last_name.description: The last name of the user.

profile_picture_url.description: A URL reference to an image representing the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

external_id.description: The external ID of the user.

metadata.description: Object containing metadata key/value pairs associated with the user.

last_sign_in_at.description: The timestamp when the user last signed in.

new_email.description: The new email address the user is changing to.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the email change code expires.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the email change challenge was created.

code.description: The error code identifying the type of error.
